results.title: Sacramento's new Safe Camping site set to open with 100 tents in River District
results.description: (FOX40.COM) — Sacramento leaders are ready to open the city's new Safe Camping site on Wednesday in Sacramento’s River District along Sequoia Pacific Boulevard. The 100-tent site was created as leaders aim to address the homelessness crisis in the city. The tents will be set up on platforms between metal shipping containers with overhead canopies [...]
